metadata.methodology: Tax relief value includes estimated mandatory business rates relief (80%), Gift Aid benefit, and corporation tax exemption on surpluses, as estimated by the Independent Schools Council and Charity Commission. Per-pupil gap is the difference between average independent school day fees and DfE state school per-pupil funding (£).
knownIssues: Tax relief estimates are modelled from available accounts data and may understate total relief where schools have complex charitable structures.
VAT on independent school fees was introduced from January 2025 — data reflects the pre-VAT position.
